title: pilosella brachiata subsp. gracillima
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. gracillima is a subspecies of the Pilosella brachiata plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Pilosella brachiata subsp. gracillima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
